title: Interview Answer Record
description: Machine-checkable M45 interview answer record. Stores interview evidence and boundaries only.

interview_id.description: Unique interview record identifier; must be non-empty.

created_at.description: Record creation timestamp string; format checks may be handled by downstream validation.

interview_status.description: Interview status within M45. INTERVIEW_READY_FOR_SPEC does not mean approved for implementation.

source_user_input.description: Raw user-provided input text; must be non-empty.

idea_summary.description: Neutral short summary of source_user_input. Must not add information not present in source_user_input.

problem_summary.description: Problem statement from user input or MISSING_FROM_INTERVIEW if not provided.

target_users.description: Target users from user input or MISSING_FROM_INTERVIEW if not provided.

current_workaround.description: How users currently cope with the problem or MISSING_FROM_INTERVIEW.

desired_outcome.description: Desired user-level outcome or MISSING_FROM_INTERVIEW if unknown.

success_criteria.description: User-level success criteria from interview evidence or MISSING_FROM_INTERVIEW.

constraints.description: Constraints from user input, NONE (only if explicitly stated), or MISSING_FROM_INTERVIEW.

risks.description: Risks from user input, NONE (only if explicitly stated), or MISSING_FROM_INTERVIEW.

non_goals.description: Out-of-scope intentions from user input, NONE (only if explicitly stated), or MISSING_FROM_INTERVIEW.

unknowns.description: Explicit list of unknown items discovered during interview.

reason.description: Optional reason why this unknown remains unresolved.

deferred.description: Whether unknown resolution is intentionally deferred.

assumptions.description: Explicit assumptions. Assumptions must be marked as assumptions, not facts.

risk_if_wrong.description: Optional risk if the assumption is incorrect.

answered_questions.description: Questions that have been answered during the interview.

field.description: Optional target field this Q/A relates to.
Optional field blocked by this unanswered question.

follow_up_questions.description: Follow-up questions for missing or ambiguous information.

field.description: Optional field targeted by this follow-up.

priority.description: Optional urgency level for the follow-up.

non_approval_warning.const: Interview evidence is not approval. Interview readiness does not authorize implementation, task creation, queue entry creation, autopilot, commit, push, merge, release, or deployment.
non_approval_warning.description: Mandatory constant warning. Confirms this record is not approval or execution authorization.
